title: Puerto Rico Act 60 / IRS presence test — 183-day prong
references: IRS Publication 570 (bona fide residence: presence test)
notes: Models only the 183-day physical presence prong: a day counts if you were in Puerto Rico any part of the day. Does not model the other ways to satisfy the presence test (549-day 3-year prong — see preset pr-presence-549-3yr, the <=90 US days prong, the earned-income prong, or the no-significant-connection prong), medical/disaster day exceptions, or the tax-home and closer-connection tests that bona fide residence also requires.
